text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is here. With the Kikuka Sho
approaching, Mejiro Bright and I discuss how we
should approach her upcoming training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it's a long-distance race, I suggest we ask
an Umamusume with experience in that category
to coach her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the plan decided, our days of blazing hot
training begin.
